guidelines: Hero should immediately communicate the product value proposition
Use a clear visual hierarchy: headline > subtext > CTA
Include a single primary CTA with an optional secondary action
Consider adding a visual element (illustration, screenshot, or video)
colorGuidance: Use brand primary color for the CTA button
Keep background neutral or use a subtle gradient
Ensure headline has maximum contrast against background
typographyGuidance: CTA text: 16-18px, medium or bold weight
spacingGuidance: Generous vertical padding: 80-120px top and bottom
commonMistakes: Too many CTAs competing for attention
Headline too long or not benefit-oriented
Missing visual contrast between hero and next section
Forgetting mobile responsiveness for large headlines
qualityChecklist: Headline clearly states the value proposition
CTA stands out visually from other elements
Layout works on both mobile and desktop viewports
Text is readable against the background
